rules.hero_h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.05] text-white
rules.overline: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#1F5FD0] font-bold

specs.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal using framer-motion. Wrapper has `overflow: hidden`. Inner text animates from `y: '100%'` to `y: 0` with `duration: 1.2`, `ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]`, and `staggerChildren: 0.15`.
specs.scroll_reveal: Fade up with blur. `initial={{ y: 40, opacity: 0, filter: 'blur(10px)' }}`, `whileInView={{ y: 0, opacity: 1, filter: 'blur(0px)' }}`, `viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}`.
specs.marquee: Use `react-fast-marquee`. Extremely slow drift. Text uses outline style (`WebkitTextStroke: '1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'`, `color: 'transparent'`), uppercase, mono font.
specs.hover_states: Buttons use subtle scale (`scale: 0.98` on tap) and inner glow transitions. Cards use 1px border illumination on hover.

layouts.bento_grid: 12-column CSS grid. Asymmetrical spans. Example: 'col-span-12 md:col-span-8' next to 'col-span-12 md:col-span-4'. Strict 1px borders to separate cells.

components.hero: 100vh height. Absolute positioned `react-tsparticles` canvas in background rendering slow-moving network/hexagons. Center aligned massive text: 'Built on Research. Driven by Alpha.'
components.waitlist_module: Glassmorphic container. Input: `bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#1F5FD0] outline-none text-white font-mono`. Button: Pill-shaped, `bg-[#1F5FD0] text-white hover:shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(31,95,208,0.5)]` transition.
components.hexagonal_nodes: Drawn using SVG + Framer Motion. Three nodes: Quantitative Analysis, Market Research, Systematic Investing. Connected by dashed paths with a 'drawing' animation (`strokeDashoffset` transition).
components.data_readout: Terminal-style micro-component in the 'Disciplined Framework' section. Black background, mono font, glowing green/blue text for 'SIGNAL STRENGTH: 0.847 / REGIME: RISK_ON'.
components.navigation: Fixed top. Glassmorphism: `backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#030408]/60 border-b border-white/5`. Logo left, links center, CTA right.
components.footer: Deep padding `py-32`. Top border `border-t border-white/10`. Massive 'SAPPHIRE ALPHA' wordmark at the bottom (`text-[12vw] font-black text-white/5`). Grid layout for legal/social links.

visual_enhancers.textures: Include a fixed fullscreen `pointer-events-none` div with a static noise/grain SVG background, set to `opacity-5 mix-blend-overlay` to eliminate flat digital gradients.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Standard formula: `backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50`.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use soft radial gradients behind key UI elements. E.g., `radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(31,95,208,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%)`.

images.strategy: No human photos, no cheesy stock charts. Purely abstract geometric, architectural, or code-based textures. Rely primarily on UI, typography, and canvas particle motion for aesthetics.

3d_libraries.name: react-tsparticles
3d_libraries.purpose: Network background. Command: `yarn add react-tsparticles tsparticles`

3d_libraries.name: framer-motion
3d_libraries.purpose: Complex scroll animations and line reveals. Command: `yarn add framer-motion`

3d_libraries.name: react-fast-marquee
3d_libraries.purpose: Slow editorial marquee. Command: `yarn add react-fast-marquee`

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA contrast. Never use pure #000000; use #030408 to reduce eye strain. Text on void background must be at least #94A3B8.
accessibility.focus: Custom focus rings: `focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#1F5FD0] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#030408]`.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: NO LIGHT MODE. This is a dark-theme exclusive UI. Hardcode dark hex codes or use the generic Tailwind palette strictly in a dark context.
Avoid standard 'Bootstrap' centering. Prioritize asymmetrical grids and strong left-alignments.
Create depth entirely through layered design elements with z-index, glassmorphism filters, and 1px borders. Do not use flat muddy grays.
Never apply universal transitions (`transition: all`). Target explicit properties (`transition-colors duration-300`).
Install and configure Lenis in a top-level `SmoothScroll` provider component to ensure the entire page feels physically weighty and premium.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. If you think `p-8` is enough, use `p-16`.
DO NOT use generic HTML inputs. Build a custom Waitlist component using Shadcn or raw Tailwind that matches the elite institutional aesthetic.

Make sure the `SAC` logo is rendered appropriately, ensuring any bright backgrounds from the image are handled or it is used inside a dedicated light pill/container if it's not transparent/dark-friendly.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize the app with Tailwind CSS and install all specified libraries (Framer Motion, Lenis, ts-particles, react-fast-marquee). 2. Setup the custom fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, JetBrains Mono, Satoshi) in the global CSS. 3. Build the 'Kinetic Hero' with a masked line-by-line typography reveal, layered over a ts-particles hexagonal network canvas. 4. Implement the 'Coming Soon' waitlist module with high-end glassmorphism and validation. 5. Construct the 'Manifesto' using the Bento grid and asymmetric layouts. 6. Build the custom 'Understanding Markets' SVG/Framer node diagram. 7. Assemble the 'Disciplined Framework' with the retro-terminal data readout. 8. Finalize with the ultra-padded professional Footer and slow Marquee. 9. Verify every interaction has a `data-testid`.
